configurations.name: chatbot-chat
configurations.description: Interactive CLI chat session (Typer app). Runs until you /exit.

configurations.name: chatbot-migrate
configurations.description: Apply DB schema migrations (idempotent). Exits immediately after completion.

configurations.name: chatbot-init-kb
configurations.description: Force (re)index the built-in demo knowledge base. Exits after completion.

configurations.name: chatbot-reset-indexes
configurations.description: Truncate all documents, chunks, and memory from PostgreSQL. Exits after completion.
